name: maintenanceSchedule
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.services.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.milesUntilDue) && typeof s.status === 'string'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). DOUBLE-WRAP wiring: the lens (AutomotiveActionPanel/VehicleHistory/CalcPanel) sends input:{artifact:{data:{...}}}, so the dispatch's artifact.data ends up as {artifact:{data}}; resolveData() peels exactly one wrapper (carpentry-class double-wrap fix) — also accepts bare params + the currentMileage alias. Rejects mileage<=0 / non-finite ('1e999'→Infinity→parseInt NaN→0→rejected): fail-CLOSED. Returns the 12 OEM-typical service intervals with per-item milesUntilDue + status (due-now/upcoming/ok). Pure compute, no STATE, no network. Pinned by server/tests/automotive-lens-macros.test.js.
